description: No accepted nutrition row for today → coverage=insufficient → R-coverage forces defer. Reinforces the v1 macros-only contract: absence of a daily-macros row is NOT a deficiency, it's missing evidence. micronutrient_coverage resolves to 'unknown' when derivation_path is unset; it only resolves to 'unavailable_at_source' when the row exists and is explicitly stamped 'daily_macros'.
